label_settings_group_compilations_detail: Tratar carpetas como álbumes (útil para compilaciones de varios artistas).
label_settings_reset_details: Elimina playlists, favoritos, imágenes en caché y restablece la aplicación. Requiere reinicio.
label_settings_reset_confirm_details: ¿Seguro que quieres restablecer? La aplicación se reiniciará.
label_playlist_wizard_match_any: Coincidir con al menos una regla
label_playlist_wizard_pattern_help: * coincide con cualquier texto, ? con un solo carácter.
label_playlist_delete_details: Esto eliminará la playlist '{playlistName}' de tu biblioteca.
label_playlist_tracks_delete_details: Esto quitará las pistas seleccionadas de '{playlistName}'.
label_submenu_media_collection_open_in_f: Abrir en el explorador de archivos
label_cover_embed_select_hint: Se encontraron {count} imagen(es) en la carpeta del álbum. Elige la que se escribirá en cada pista de este álbum.
label_cover_embed_empty: No se encontraron archivos de imagen en la carpeta del álbum.
label_cover_embed_no_directory: No se pudo determinar el directorio del álbum.
label_cover_embed_no_tracks: No se encontraron pistas para este álbum.
label_liked_tracks_delete_details: Esto quitará las pistas seleccionadas de tus Favoritos.
message_dsd_requires_bitperfect: DSD playback is available only when Bit-Perfect is enabled.
label_settings_theme_description: Elige tu esquema de color preferido
label_settings_language_description: Cambiar el idioma de la aplicación
label_settings_hide_artist_description: Ocultar el nombre del artista en las portadas
label_settings_reset_app_description: Restablecer todos los ajustes y limpiar la base de datos local.
label_settings_audio_cd_import_descripti: Carpeta de salida, plantilla de nombre y credenciales Discogs para importaciones FLAC
label_settings_manual_database_refresh: Actualización manual de la base de datos
message_audio_cd_discogs_no_results: No se encontraron resultados en Discogs.
message_audio_cd_discogs_suggestions_fou: Se encontraron sugerencias de Discogs. Confirma la selección o ajusta la búsqueda.
message_audio_cd_discogs_multiple_result: Se encontraron varios resultados en Discogs. Haz clic en «Seleccionar metadatos».
message_audio_cd_cached_metadata_loaded: Se cargaron metadatos de Discogs guardados para este CD.
message_audio_cd_discogs_details_failed: No se pudieron cargar los detalles de Discogs.
message_audio_cd_choose_import_directory: Primero selecciona una carpeta de importación en ajustes.
label_audio_cd_not_detected: No se detectó CD de audio.
label_audio_cd_dialog_description: Si el CD no se identifica claramente, confirma la búsqueda y selecciona el resultado correcto.
label_equalizer_headroom_compensation_de: Reduce automáticamente el preamplificador con realce positivo del EQ
label_settings_media_keys_global_shortcu: Activo: Reproducir/Pausar, Anterior/Siguiente se gestionan en todo el sistema por Aurora.
Inactivo: macOS u otra app está gestionando las teclas multimedia.
label_settings_media_keys_accessibility_: No permitido. Sin este permiso, macOS puede enviar las teclas a Apple Music.
label_settings_media_keys_restart_hint: Tras cambiar esto, reinicia Aurora Pulse.
label_settings_artist_view_mode_descript: Controla la página de Artistas: Desactivado oculta artistas, Artistas muestra todos los artistas de pista, Artistas de álbum muestra artistas de álbum y solo usa artistas de pista para recopilaciones como Various Artists.
label_settings_bit_perfect_description: Ruta de audio exclusiva hacia tu DAC. Si no hay un backend compatible, la reproducción normal sigue activa.
label_settings_dlna_server_description: Comparte tu biblioteca en la red local. Los clientes pueden descubrir el servidor automáticamente en la misma red.
label_settings_updates_auto_description: Activado: busca, descarga, instala y reinicia automáticamente. Desactivado: búsqueda e instalación manuales.
label_settings_updates_beta_description: Activado: las instalaciones estables también pueden recibir versiones beta más nuevas.
label_settings_updates_save_error: No se pudieron guardar los ajustes de actualización. Inténtalo de nuevo.
message_playlist_export_dap_target_missi: Select a DAP target directory in Settings first
label_equalizer_subtitle: Adjust each frequency band from -12 dB to +12 dB
label_settings_dap_transport_desc: Copy via a mounted player folder, or push to the phone over ADB (USB debugging).
label_settings_dap_adb_paths_help: Music is written under …/Music and podcasts under …/Podcasts (same layout as on internal storage). When an SD card is present, those bases are used on the card; otherwise internal storage. One USB-connected device is assumed; no path or serial has to be set. If adb is not installed, a bundled binary is used automatically when available.
label_settings_dap_auto_sync_desc_adb: Automatically start ADB sync after library updates when a device is connected.
label_settings_dap_delete_missing_desc_a: When implemented, removes files on the device that are no longer in Aurora Pulse (mirrors the filesystem option).
label_settings_dap_adb_not_implemented: ADB device sync is not active in this build yet; paths and incremental transfer will follow the same rules as filesystem DAP.
label_settings_dap_auto_sync_desc: Automatically sync to USB/SD after library updates.
label_settings_dap_delete_missing_desc: Removes tracks in the sync folder that are no longer in Aurora Pulse.
label_player_output_device_none: No se encontraron dispositivos DLNA remotos
label_dashboard_insights_subtitle: Dashboard overview of your local music collection
settings_info_thanks_desc_1: Aurora Pulse thrives on your feedback, bug reports and ideas. Every reply — via the issue tracker, email or Reddit — feeds straight back into our roadmap.
settings_info_thanks_desc_2: Many improvements in recent releases (library performance, DAP sync, podcast integration, equalizer profiles, UI polish) are based on concrete community input. Thank you for shaping the player together with us.
settings_info_thanks_desc_3: If you enjoy Aurora Pulse we love hearing more feedback, GitHub stars and your stories about how you experience your music.
settings_info_pulse_launcher_title: Aurora Pulse Launcher — el companion para Android
settings_info_pulse_launcher_desc_1: Aurora Pulse Launcher is a standalone Android launcher tailored for music and podcast lovers as well as DAPs (Digital Audio Players). Instead of a generic app grid, your music, podcasts and quick playback controls take center stage — combined with a focused, distraction-free home screen.
settings_info_pulse_launcher_desc_2: A perfect companion to Aurora Pulse: sync your library to your Android device with DAP Sync and enjoy it on the go in a launcher built specifically for music.
settings_info_pulse_launcher_feature_hom: Music-first home screen with Now Playing, artwork, and volume / playback controls right from the lock screen
settings_info_pulse_launcher_feature_lib: Quick access to albums, artists, playlists and podcasts — with a cover wall and large, finger-friendly controls
settings_info_pulse_launcher_feature_dap: DAP Sync compatibility: plays the folder layout (Music/Podcasts) synced by Aurora Pulse natively — including from SD card
settings_info_pulse_launcher_feature_pod: Built-in podcast player with episode management, progress tracking and automatic resume
settings_info_pulse_launcher_feature_wid: Customizable widgets, Vibe themes and wallpapers for portrait and landscape — ideal for DAPs with horizontal displays
settings_info_pulse_launcher_feature_foc: Focus mode: no noisy app drawer, just a curated set of audio apps and shortcuts
settings_info_pulse_launcher_feature_off: 100% offline-capable, privacy-friendly and tracking-free — aligned with Aurora Pulse local-first philosophy
label_settings_dap_reset_state_descripti: Resets the stored sync state. On the next sync, all files are re-checked and copied if needed (e.g. after formatting the SD card).
label_settings_dap_reset_state_done: Sync state has been reset. All files will be transferred again on the next sync.
label_settings_dlna_upnp_description_suf: When enabled, it starts automatically and is published as a UPnP MediaServer (DMS) via SSDP discovery.
